title_en: DreamerV3 proves latent world models remain competitive
title_zh: DreamerV3 证明潜在世界模型路线依然强劲
description_en: DreamerV3 becomes a reference implementation for model-based RL at scale.
description_zh: DreamerV3 成为大规模模型驱动强化学习的重要参照实现。
why_it_matters: It keeps the model-based control tradition relevant in the era of foundation models.
